---
title: "Ricardo Ruiz Sánchez" # if using a built-in template, this title appears under your photo
image: media/gima_all.png # great spot for your professional headshot :) 
toc: false # remove "On this page" table of contents
about: 
  template: trestles # see other templates at https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html#templates
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin # you'll need to the fontawesome extension to include icons: https://github.com/quarto-ext/fontawesome
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ricardo-r-s
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:r.ruizsanchez@students.uu.nl
---

Data-driven environmental scientist with a passion for geographical information data. Started
collecting data from the laboratory as a technician, I graduated in Environmental Sciences
understanding the value of making informed-decisions towards a sustainable future. Along this
journey I lived in Scotland and Germany. Drafted by the interest on geospatial data from the
GIMA1 master, I am enthusiastic to land an internship in a GIS working environment.
:::grid
::: g-col-
